nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 多明尼加

nodes.name: White-crowned pigeon
nodes.summary: White-crowned pigeon（White-crowned pigeon，学名 Patagioenas leucocephala），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐、农药污染。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Other threats to this species include (in Florida) a major cause of mortality is collision with man-made objects; and pesticide use. Like the extinct passenger pigeon, this species illustrates a very important principle of conservation biology: it is not always necessary to kill the last pair of a species to force it to extinction
